chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-279 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A No.S-2613/ 2025. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 26.12.2025 Mr. Abdul Majeed Lashari advocate for the applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = Mr. Abdul Majeed Lashari advocate for the applicant, under instructions from his client, states that he does not wish to press this Criminal Miscellaneous application; hence same is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
